title: Mavi Yaka
shortDescription: Blue collar jobs in 31 countries! 17 sectors, instant alerts, 100% free.
fullDescription:
Mavi Yaka is your go-to app for finding blue collar and skilled trade jobs across 31 countries. From warehouses to factories, construction sites to retail floors — your next job is here.

Stop scrolling through dozens of job sites. Mavi Yaka gathers thousands of blue collar job listings from top employers, updated daily, and delivers them straight to you.

★ WHY MAVI YAKA?

● 17 Sectors, Thousands of Jobs
Logistics & Warehousing, Manufacturing & Production, Retail & Stores, Construction, Food & Beverage, Automotive, Textile & Garment, Mining, Healthcare & Caregiving, Hospitality & Tourism, Agriculture, Security, Facility Management, Metal & Steel, Chemicals, E-commerce & Delivery, Telecommunications.

● 31 Countries, One App
Find jobs in USA, UK, Germany, Turkey, India, Brazil, Indonesia, Russia, Mexico, Japan, Philippines, Thailand, Canada, Australia, France, Italy, Spain, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, South Korea, Argentina, UAE, Vietnam, Poland, Malaysia, Colombia, South Africa, Portugal, Netherlands, Pakistan, and Sweden.

● Follow Companies & Get Alerts
Follow employers you want to work for and get instant push notifications when they post new openings. Never miss an opportunity.

● Save Jobs
Bookmark listings you like and come back to them anytime.

● Smart Filters
Filter by sector, city, company, and job type. Find the right job, fast.

● 100% Free to Use
All core features are completely free. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited alerts and an ad-free experience.

★ WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT
✓ All blue collar jobs in one place
✓ Daily-updated job listings
✓ Available in 19 languages
✓ Lightweight, fast, and incredibly easy to use
✓ No account required to start browsing

Find your next job with Mavi Yaka. Download now and start your job search today!
